signals.raw:
Trump Announces Two-Week Ceasefire with Iran; Israel Joins; Predicts 'Golden Age of the Middle East' | YES | HIGH confidence**

A two-week "double-sided ceasefire" between the US and Iran was confirmed by President Trump on Truth Social Tuesday night (April 14, 2026), suspending US bombing after meeting military objectives and advancing long-term peace talks, including Strait of Hormuz access[1][4

signals.headline: Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at +2
signals.raw:
Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at +2.7% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's official inflation rate rose to +2.7% year-on-year in March 2026 (CPI), up from +1.9% in February, driven by sharp increases in motor fuel and heating oil prices amid the Iran war; this is the highest since January 2024 and confirms provisional data released earlier.[2] Core inflation (excluding food and ener
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2.2% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, below market forecasts of 2.4% but marking a three-month high due to energy pressures from the Iran conflict; core inflation eased to 2.2%.[3][4] Polymarket odds for 2026 annual CPI at 3.0%+ stand at 36%, reflecting upside risks post-Bank of Kore

signals.headline: Germany 2026 GDP Forecast Downgraded to +0
signals.raw:
Germany 2026 GDP Forecast Downgraded to +0.6% | YES | MED confidence**  
The Joint Economic Forecast Spring 2026 (released April 1) cut Germany's real GDP growth projection to +0.6% for 2026 (from prior +1.2%), after 2025's near-stagnation at +0.2%, due to energy price shocks eroding purchasing power despite fiscal stimulus.[1] A working-day adjustment reduces it further by 0.2pp; 2027 forecast is
